title: senna flexuosa
intro: Senna flexuosa, also known as the flexible cassia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and flexible branches. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effects, which are attributed to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, such as sennoside A and B. The health benefits of Senna flexuosa include treating constipation, digestive issues, and certain skin conditions, while also being used as a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. Senna flexuosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and reduce potential side effects.
